CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

1. No opposition filed.
2. Motion to approve settlement and consent judgement/Granted.

Order submitted. Consent Judgment submitted.

Judge: Barbara Zuniga; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/BZ)
